text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heave, ho! Heave, ho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, and Mejiro Ryan is delivering
a huge rectangular object to my office. I have no
idea what it is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This is what Valentine's is all about!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wrong! It's my gift to you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: There's homemade chocolate inside, of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I ask why the package is so big.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well... I'm not used to making things on my
own, so I didn't know how much I'd need.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to ask one of the Mejiro family
maids for help, so I did it all by myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Anyway, go ahead and open it up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the massive present and see a giant,
almond-shaped piece of chocolate inside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wait, it actually looks like... a thigh muscle? I'm
not sure I understand the idea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you could give it a taste right now? Just a
little...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Please... let it be tasty...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I break off a piece and take a bite.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I picked out the ingredients myself! Had to run all
the way to another town to get them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's such a relief that it tastes good. I'm glad you
like it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The chocolate is as distinct as Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite its strange shape, it has a pleasing taste.
I can really tell she put a lot of effort into making
it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you enjoyed it, then by all means have
some more! I've got lots!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And I really do have lots and lots and lots!
choice_data_list: Thank you for the giant chocolate thigh muscle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What? It's not shaped like a thigh muscle. That'd
look totally different!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um, well, I was aiming for...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Let's say a UFO-shaped chocolate. However you
look at it... it's kinda mysterious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought it was like an almond at first, so I guess
it's an almond-shaped UFO.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I ponder whether she has an interest in strange
phenomena, I continue eating the tasty
chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
To be honest with you... it's supposed to be a
heart. But it sorta got stuck together when I was
molding it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted to give you a huge heart! Like,
"Look how special I think you are, Trainer! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: A-am I... Does that sound crazy?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Waaaah! There's no deeper meaning to it! It's a
thigh muscle! Yup, just a plain ol' thigh
muscle-shaped chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She calms down eventually, but for some reason
her face remains a bright red.
